case_title: BARCLAYS BANK DELAWARE VS. GUILLERMO A DELGADO ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF SEP-01-2020 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-02-2020 CONTINUED TO SEP-01-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
